header.note: The source node in most cases contains the sample message as written by the developer. If it looks like a dot-delimitted string such as "form.label.firstname", then the developer has not provided a default message.

trans-unit.resname: At least one Layout must remain active
trans-unit.source: At least one Layout must remain active
trans-unit.note: key: At least one Layout must remain active
key: Block type '%block_type%' was disabled for '%landing_page_fd_name%'.
key: Could not find Page for '%identifier%'

trans-unit.resname: Disabled blocks with identifiers: '%blockIdList%' does not exist in Page builder configuration
trans-unit.source: Disabled blocks with identifiers: '%blockIdList%' does not exist in Page builder configuration
trans-unit.note: key: Disabled blocks with identifiers: '%blockIdList%' does not exist in Page builder configuration

trans-unit.resname: Disabled layouts with identifiers: '%layoutsIdList%' does not exist in Page builder configuration
trans-unit.source: Disabled layouts with identifiers: '%layoutsIdList%' does not exist in Page builder configuration
trans-unit.note: key: Disabled layouts with identifiers: '%layoutsIdList%' does not exist in Page builder configuration

trans-unit.resname: Value '%value%' for attribute '%attributeName%' in block '%blockName%' is invalid: %reason%
trans-unit.source: Value '%value%' for attribute '%attributeName%' in block '%blockName%' is invalid: %reason%
trans-unit.note: key: Value '%value%' for attribute '%attributeName%' in block '%blockName%' is invalid: %reason%
key: Value '%value%' in block '%blockName%' is invalid: %reason%
